headlines.h: Weather Alert: Bro was not that tuff💔
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Bless your ears humans"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Opinion: This is actually peak human achievement (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-09)
